calendar.matters:
Minor'S Compromise
Off Calendar Sep-22-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 514, Judge: Michael Begert, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: A. Howell, CSR #3542

Melinda Derish, Esq. for Petitioner: Dexter Cato, as guardian ad litem for and with: Amber Cato, a minor Claimant,
Petitioner was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Compromise in the amount of $218,750.00
Attorney Fees $41,630.80
Costs 933.55
A net proceeds of $176,185.65 will be used to purchase the future annuity structured for a guaranteed payout of $250,000.00 with remaining balance of $1,185.65 to be deposited into a blocked account as stated in the order. See scan doc. for details.

Orders signed by Judge Michael Begert.
